title: Development
description: An affordable-housing development financed by HDC — the core unit of what HDC does. HDC pairs tax-exempt/taxable bonds with as-of-right 4% Low-Income Housing Tax Credits and its corporate reserves to fund new construction, acquisition/rehabilitation, and preservation. HDC publishes NO dataset of its own; the closest machine-readable record of HDC-financed developments is HPD's 'Low Income Housing Tax Credits Awarded by HPD' project-level datasets — the 4% awards are precisely the deals financed through HDC's tax-exempt bonds. This schema reconciles those adjacent (HPD-owned) columns into an HDC-owned resource, keyed on BBL.

x-source.note: No HDC-owned dataset exists. Columns below are reconciled from HPD's LIHTC 4% project-level dataset (p8i7-ix2s), which carries HDC's bond-financed 4% deals.

totalTaxCreditUnits.description: Units supported by tax credits ('Total Tax Credit Units').

applicationYear.description: Year the tax-credit / financing application was received ('Application Year').
